name: 🛒 Shop
description: Customers, products and orders — classic e-commerce schema joined into a silver fact and aggregated to monthly revenue and top customers.

pipelines.name: customers
pipelines.description: 500 synthetic customers with email, country and signup date.

pipelines.name: products
pipelines.description: 50 products across five categories with prices in EUR.

pipelines.name: orders
pipelines.description: 5000 orders linking customers to products with quantity and date.

pipelines.name: orders_enriched
pipelines.description: Orders joined with customer and product info — the silver fact.

pipelines.name: customer_lifetime
pipelines.description: Per-customer aggregate: order count, lifetime value, last order date.

pipelines.name: revenue_by_month
pipelines.description: Monthly revenue and order count — the time-series gold view.

quality_tests.name: orders_have_customer
quality_tests.description: Every order in the silver fact must have a matching customer.
